description: Blind call transfer via SIP REFER with RTP media re-exchange: alice↔bob1 is established, bob1 REFERs the call to bob2, the SUT drives the C-leg + NOTIFY + both realign re-INVITEs, and after merge(a,c) alice and bob2 exchange real audio. The 'hears' checks (alice hears bob2 / bob2 hears alice) prove media survived the transfer; saved as playable .wav beside the result.
